channel.title: Pages on Cheng Music
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Cheng Music

item.title: About me
item.description: Hello. I’m Cheng. I do music in my spare time just for fun. Some of my works are posted here so you can have a look. I have been working on music in EDM music (for high-tech themed games) Horror music (for some ghost-chasing games) Ambient music (for some sightseeing games, but mainly for the game credit scene) Chilli music (for some calm games) Hope you like my music (and me as well).
